My Capabilities

Enterprise Software Services

Tailored, end-to-end design and engineering configurations built to resolve complex requirements.

Android Development

Custom mobile packages including shopping platforms, inventory control nodes, and backend database integrations.

  • Native Java Performance
  • Firebase Cloud Sync
  • API & Payments Gateways

Website Engineering

High-end corporate, e-commerce, and admin portals optimized for conversions, speed, and premium look.

  • Responsive layouts (Mobile first)
  • SEO & Schema optimization
  • Interactive Dashboards

Desktop & ERP Systems

Multi-branch POS software, inventory controllers, and operations manager systems built with WPF and .NET Core.

  • Speedy Local Data Caches
  • Automated Backup Modules
  • Billing & Receipt Generation

Database Architecture

Performance optimization, structural setup, and SQL queries configured for integrity and rapid data serving.

  • SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SQLite
  • Procedure Optimizations
  • Migration & Replication Setup

3D Visualization & Design

Architectural renderings, custom product assets, animations, and game-engine ready models built using Blender.

  • High Fidelity 3D Models
  • Unreal Engine Integration
  • Product rendering

Design & Video Assets

Dynamic marketing media, custom brand identities, logo vectors, and high-impact social layouts to grow your reach.

  • Creative Video Editing
  • Modern Vector Logos
  • Social Marketing Graphic Assets
Tech Core

Technical Ecosystem

Expert configurations across frameworks, database cores, and cloud stacks.

Languages
Java C# / .NET JavaScript SQL / T-SQL
Frameworks & Tools
Android Studio Firebase WPF / Desktop React JS Blender 3D
Recent Work

Engineered Deployments

A selection of premium projects designed and deployed to resolve specific business demands.

E-Commerce Ecosystem +300% Sales

Impotex Web E-Shop

Complete e-commerce infrastructure supporting global online processing, integrated stripe payment layers, inventories controllers, and visual manager dashboards.

React JS Node.js Stripe Gateway Cloud Database
Retail Software -60% Checkout time

Sales Pro POS System

High-speed billing desktop software featuring barcode readers scanner setups, receipts generators modules, and real-time inventory adjustments metrics.

C# / WPF SQL Server LocalDB Reporting Engine
Enterprise Operations 5 Branches Sync

Naseer Leather ERP

Multi-branch ERP software sync module connecting production lines, shipping hubs, inventory databases, and administrative records.

Java SQL Replication WCF Sync Hub
Restaurant Tech 99.8% Order Accuracy

Smart Ordering System

An Android app for restaurant guests allowing interactive visual menus ordering, and simultaneous kitchen screen update setups.

Java (Native) Firebase Firestore Cloud Messaging
